title: YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW BEAVERTON YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides alcohol and drug outpatient services for youth and their families, including integrated mental health services. Services are available in the community, including schools. Also provides a bilingual, culturally specific outpatient program for Latino youth and their families. 10700 SW Beaverton-Hillside Highway Suite 110 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Ages 12-18 (19 if still in high school) and their families. Culturally specific program serves the Hispanic/Latino community. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-6pm Email (503) 641-1475 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 641-1475 Intake (503) 645-9010 Toll-free (888) 645-1666 Intake Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals on sliding scale. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 48 on Cornell Road Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PROMOTORA MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SEVERE MENTAL ILLNESS SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TRANSITION-AGE YOUTH SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW BEAVERTON
